name: date-input
description: Date picker input block with calendar UI.

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled ISO date string value in YYYY-MM-DD format.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Called with an ISO YYYY-MM-DD date string once the user has typed a complete valid date.

props.name: label
props.description: Label text displayed above the input field.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text shown when the input is empty.

props.name: error
props.description: Error message displayed below the field; also activates the error colour state.

props.name: helperText
props.description: Helper text displayed below the field when there is no error.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the input field, preventing user interaction.

props.name: containerStyle
props.description: Style applied to the outer container wrapping the label, input, and helper text.

props.name: testID
props.description: Stable test identifier passed to the underlying TextInput for automated testing.
